reference: I had a hip replaced three years ago, and sometimes it feels like it jumps out of joint. If I stand and move around, then everything seems okay again. Then, two years ago, I had the other hip done, and after that, I noticed that the leg between the ankle and knee is about one inch or more larger than the other leg. Why is that?
text: I had a hip replacement years ago, and sometimes it feels like it jumps out of here. If I stand and move around, then everything seems okay. Then two years ahead, the other hip bone, and after that, I notice that the leg between the ankle and knee is about one inch or more larger than the other leg. Why is that?
